texto: Not every problem can be solved. Some are okay simply to avoid. Go around the, go under them, whatever it takes to reach your higher goal. Sometimes you have to fail your way to success.
explicacao: Orientação direta de Anna Mitchael sobre passagem do tempo e prioridades. A afirmação “Not every problem can be solved. Some are okay simply to avoid. Go around the, go under them, wha…” funciona como lembrete prático ligado a reflexao, positive-quotes, every, útil em momentos de reflexao.
